About Me

Turn Your Business Into a
Revenue Machine

I've spent the last 6 years specializing in GoHighLevel — building CRM systems, funnels, and follow-up automation that run on autopilot. My goal is simple: help you grow your business, save time, and run smoother operations using smart automation, proven funnels, and AI tools that actually work.

Whether you're a service provider, local business, or SaaS startup — I integrate landing pages, CRM pipelines, calendar bookings, email/SMS flows, and analytics into one streamlined platform so you never have to juggle multiple tools again.

Get Your Free Audit →
What I Do

Services

End-to-end systems that attract leads, convert customers, and keep them coming back — all inside one platform.

⚙️

Automation & AI Integration

  • GHL Setup & Optimization — Full CRM config, pipeline creation, and workflow automation
  • Zapier & API Workflows — Connect apps to eliminate repetitive tasks
  • AI-Powered Communication — Chatbots, automated follow-ups, and lead qualification
  • Staff Onboarding Automation — Hiring forms, applicant tracking, interview scheduling
🚀

Funnel Strategy & Build

  • Sales Page Creation — High-converting landing pages optimized for your audience
  • Lead Magnet Funnels — Build email lists through free resources, webinars, or trials
  • Checkout & Upsell Flows — Maximize revenue with optimized purchase journeys
📈

Client Acquisition Systems

  • Cold Email Outreach — Personalized campaigns that start genuine conversations
  • Website & GMB Optimization — Get found on Google by your ideal clients
  • Lead Tracking & Reporting — Real-time dashboards showing your ROI
Why Work With Me

What Sets Me Apart

I don't just build systems — I build them with the bigger picture in mind. Every decision ties back to your business goals.

🧠

Proven Skill in Automation & AI

I don't just "know" tools — I know how to combine them to create smooth, end-to-end systems. From CRM workflows to AI-powered chatbots, I make technology work for the business instead of the other way around.

📊

Focus on Measurable Results

Every project starts with a goal. Whether it's increasing enrollment, reducing manual work, or generating leads — I track and report on the numbers that matter so you can see the actual impact.

⚡

Adaptable & Quick to Learn

Businesses and technologies change fast — I adapt even faster. I'm comfortable learning new tools, strategies, or processes if it means delivering better outcomes for you.

💼

Business-Minded Perspective

I understand that every automation, funnel, or campaign needs to contribute to growth, efficiency, and client satisfaction. I build with the bigger picture in mind, always.

What I Build

Automation Systems & Workflows

I don't just complete tasks — I build complete systems that capture leads, book appointments, answer calls, nurture prospects, and keep your operations running automatically. Here's the full journey, from first contact to compliant follow-up.

Lead Capture & Instant Follow-Up System

Turns every form submission into an instant, automated response — capturing leads, sending case studies, and enrolling them in nurture sequences without lifting a finger.

Tools & Features

GoHighLevel · Forms · Workflow Automation

✓ Never lose a lead — respond in seconds, not hours.
View Case Study PDF →

Appointment Booking & Reminder Workflow

From calendar selection to confirmation and timed reminders, this system books appointments and keeps clients showing up with automated email & SMS nudges.

Tools & Features

GoHighLevel · Calendars · Email/SMS Reminders

✓ Fewer no-shows, fuller calendar, zero manual scheduling.
View Case Study PDF →

AI Receptionist & Call Handling Workflow

An AI voice agent answers inbound calls, captures caller details, books appointments, and routes follow-up — turning every missed call into a tracked opportunity.

Tools & Features

AI Voice Agent · GPT-4o · CRM Integration

✓ Answer every call 24/7 without hiring staff.
View Case Study PDF →

Email & SMS Nurture Campaign

A multi-week automated journey that keeps leads warm with scheduled emails and texts, sharing case studies and follow-ups until they're ready to book.

Tools & Features

GoHighLevel · Email · SMS · Tagging

✓ Stay top-of-mind and convert leads on autopilot.
View Case Study PDF →

CRM Pipeline Automation

Automatically updates deal stages, adds tags, and organizes opportunities as proposals change — keeping your sales pipeline clean and always up to date.

Tools & Features

GoHighLevel · Pipelines · Workflow Logic

✓ A pipeline that organizes itself, so nothing slips.
View Case Study PDF →

Zapier Data Sync & Reporting

Connects your apps so sold-services data flows automatically into Google Sheets — giving your team accurate tracking and reporting with zero manual entry.

Tools & Features

Zapier · Google Sheets · API Integrations

✓ Accurate data, synced daily, no copy-paste work.
View Case Study PDF →

Social Media Scheduling System

From content creation to scheduling across platforms, this system keeps your brand active and consistent without manual posting every single day.

Tools & Features

GoHighLevel · Social Planner · Multi-Channel

✓ Stay visible everywhere without the daily grind.
View Case Study PDF →

A2P Registration & SMS Compliance Setup

Handles consent setup, number verification, and A2P approval — making sure your business SMS campaigns stay trusted, deliverable, and fully compliant.

Tools & Features

Twilio · A2P Registration · Compliance Setup

✓ Send SMS that actually lands — compliant and trusted.
